title: Level: Impossible Guess the song from the lyrics
description: Bet you can't guess these songs from the lyrics

questions.question: Cooking like a chef I'ma 5 star Michelin

I just wanna talk about fantasy 
Let's escape from reality
Ride like the motion of the ocean, high tide in the moonlight
Let me show you how we play, it's not a game bruh
I am up above the world so high, I'll be there shining day and night...
Un, Deux, Trois, Run along with the Gods...
You can call me Harry Potter...

Gave up my youth 
For my future
I just want to
Rise up stronger

Nothing much, I confess
 All the stars in my eyes
Make my Galaxy
